text.title: REST API Design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply REST API Design end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: model-resources
step.action: Map nouns to plural URLs; relationships nested or surfaced via filters.

step.name: pick-version-strategy
step.action: Pick path versioning; document deprecation timeline shape.

step.name: define-status-codes
step.action: Map outcomes to status codes from RFC 9110.

step.name: pick-pagination
step.action: Cursor for >1k; offset acceptable for small dicts.

step.name: pick-error-format
step.decision-gate: Reject plain or custom unless documented exception.
